top_signals.title: Nvidia says it has ‘largely conceded’ China’s AI chip market to Huawei
top_signals.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the company has "largely conceded" China's advanced artificial intelligence chip market to Huawei.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Southern Copper plans $319M Cuajone mine overhaul
top_signals.summary: Peru mine upgrades aim to cut costs, sustain output and improve efficiency as ore grades decline at key sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
